summary: SourceFilter value type: pure predicate and resolver for filtering sources by type and/or name

requires: Zero value is valid and means 'match all'
guarantees: IsEmpty, Match, MatchingChannelIDs, MatchingSourceNames, FilterLabel are all pure — no side effects; nil return from Matching* means 'all' (callers must check for nil vs empty slice)

observations.text: When both Types and Names are set, Match requires both to pass (AND semantics). This is documented in the field comment but callers must be aware — the filter_overlay only ever produces Names-only filters, never Types+Names combinations.

MatchingChannelIDs and MatchingSourceNames return nil (not empty slice) when the filter is empty — callers in app.go treat nil as 'all' and pass it directly to service methods which also treat nil as 'all'.
FilterLabel calls sourceTypeBadge from dashboard.go — a mild cross-file coupling within the same package for badge string formatting.
